Name.description: Kebab-cased PK derived from the citation number (e.g. 'TC-2026-0001' -> 'tc-2026-0001').

IsMockData.description: TRUE for seed/demo rows; distinguishes mock data from real records.

CitationNumber.description: Human citation/ticket number printed on the ticket.

DriverLabel.description: Display name of the cited driver.

Jurisdiction.description: FK to the Jurisdiction in which the citation was issued (governs deadlines, penalties, points).

JurisdictionLabel.description: Display name of the issuing jurisdiction.

BaseFineUsd.description: Base fine for the cited violation, pulled from the ViolationType.

ViolationPoints.description: License points for the cited violation, pulled from the ViolationType.

IssuedOn.description: Date the citation was issued to the driver.

AsOfDate.description: The 'today' reference date used to evaluate deadlines for this citation (lets seed data exercise overdue/late states deterministically).

RespondedOn.description: Date the driver responded (paid or requested a hearing). Null if no response yet.

ContestRequested.description: Whether the driver elected to contest the citation (request a hearing) rather than pay.

PaidOn.description: Date the fine was paid in full. Null if not yet paid.

AmountPaidUsd.description: Total amount the driver has paid against this citation. Null/0 if nothing paid.

DaysToRespond.description: Response window in days, pulled from the issuing jurisdiction.

DaysToPayAfterRuling.description: Days-to-pay window, pulled from the issuing jurisdiction.

LatePenaltyPct.description: Late-penalty percentage, pulled from the issuing jurisdiction.

DaysLateToCollections.description: Days-late-to-collections window, pulled from the issuing jurisdiction.

ResponseDueDate.description: Deadline to respond: IssuedOn + the jurisdiction's response window.

DaysUntilResponseDue.description: Days remaining (negative if overdue) until the response deadline, measured from AsOfDate.

IsResponseOverdue.description: True when no response was filed and the response deadline has passed as of AsOfDate.

CountOfHearings.description: Number of hearing records attached to this citation.

LatestHearingOutcome.description: Outcome of the most recent hearing for this citation (Pending if a hearing exists but has no outcome; blank if no hearing).

ContestStatus.description: Contest/Hearing state machine: NotContested when the driver did not elect to contest; otherwise HearingRequested -> Scheduled -> Heard, reflected from the latest hearing's outcome.

IsDismissed.description: True when the latest hearing outcome dismissed the citation.

IsGuilty.description: True when the driver is liable: either found guilty/upheld at hearing, or defaulted by missing the response deadline without contesting.

AmountDueUsd.description: Amount currently owed: 0 if dismissed; otherwise the base fine plus the jurisdiction's late penalty if the payment is late.

PaymentDueDate.description: Date the fine is due: the later anchor (response deadline) plus the jurisdiction's days-to-pay window.

IsPaymentLate.description: True when the driver is liable, has not paid in full, and the payment due date has passed as of AsOfDate.

IsInCollections.description: True when a late payment has remained unpaid past the jurisdiction's collections window.

PaymentStatus.description: Payment/Penalty state machine: NotOwed (dismissed) -> Paid -> Collections -> Late -> Due. Evaluated in priority order.

EffectivePoints.description: License points this citation actually contributes to the driver: the violation's points if the driver is liable and not dismissed, otherwise 0. Drives the driver's ActivePoints rollup.

CitationStatus.description: Citation lifecycle state machine: Issued -> Responded -> InContest -> Adjudicated -> Closed. The top-level status synthesizing the other tracks.

Hearings.description: Reverse FK: hearing records for this citation.

Payments.description: Reverse FK: payment records for this citation.

CaseEvents.description: Reverse FK: append-only case-event log entries for this citation.
